---
name: Documentation change
about: Suggest an improvement or report an error in the documentation.
title: '[DOCS] - '
labels: documentation
assignees: L4DK
---

## 📝 Documentation Improvement
Which part of the documentation needs attention? (e.g., README, API Endpoints, Setup Guide).

## 🧐 What is the issue?
Is something missing, or is an instruction unclear? Please describe.

## 💡 Suggested Change
If you have a suggestion for the new text, please provide it here.

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] Is this a typo fix?
- [ ] Is this an update due to a code change?
- [ ] Does this add a new guide/tutorial?
